# Alchemist's Fire

When you take the [[attack]] action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing a flask of Alchemist's Fire. Target one creature or object you can see within 20 feet of yourself. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Dexterity modifier and [[proficiency|Proficiency Bonus]]) or take 1d4 Fire damage and start burning.
